overview: Malla Reddy College of Engineering (MRCE), Hyderabad was established in 2001 by the Malla Reddy Educational Society. It is affiliated to JNTUH and approved by AICTE. MRCE has been ranked in the 201-300 band in NIRF India Rankings 2025. The college is part of the Malla Reddy Group of Institutions, one of the largest educational groups in Telangana. MRCE is accredited by NAAC and offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs in engineering and technology.
accreditation: NAAC Accredited, NBA Accredited (select programs), AICTE approved, JNTUH affiliated

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech: 70% through TG EAPCET counselling (TSCHE convenor quota), 30% management quota. M.Tech: GATE + institutional counselling.

campus.specialNote: Part of the Malla Reddy Group of Institutions that includes 37+ institutions. Located in Maisammaguda, Secunderabad, with good connectivity to the city.
